channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Packers clinch playoff berth with 1st shutout in NFL this season, 34-0 over Saints
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — With a dominant defense leading the way, the Green Bay Packers clinched a playoff berth by producing their most lopsided win in a decade.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Embiid ejected after drawing 2 technicals in game against Wembanyama and Spurs
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers star Joel Embiid was ejected in the first half of Monday night’s 111-106 victory over the San Antonio Spurs after drawing two technical fouls Referee Jenna Schroeder ejected Embiid with 2:59 left in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: AARON BRACY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tank Dell out for season with dislocated knee, torn ACL. Texans claim Diontae Johnson off waivers
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Houston Texans receiver Tank Dell will miss the remainder of the season after dislocating a knee and tearing an ACL in a loss to Kansas City on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How Red Sox signings could bolster SF Giants’ odds of signing Corbin Burnes
item.description: The Red Sox were reportedly finalists to sign Corbin Burnes, but they might be out of the race after signing two starting pitchers
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Georgia turns to backup Stockton at quarterback in CFP quarterfinal; Beck has season-ending surgery
item.description: No. 2 Georgia is resting its national championship hopes on backup quarterback Gunner Stockton following Carson Beck's season-ending elbow surgery on Monday. Coach Kirby Smart said Monday that Georgia is preparing Stockton to start in the Sugar Bowl on Jan.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA appealed Monday the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization's Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Texas, Arizona State to meet in CFP clash of old vs. new Big 12 champs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas won the Big 12 title in 2023 on its way out the door to the Southeastern Conference. It was still swinging open when Arizona State waltzed in and won the league title in its debut season.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penn State preparing for hard-charging Jeanty and Boise State in CFP quarterfinals
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — Penn State players have watched Ashton Jeanty make opponents look silly all season. They don't want to be the next defenders Boise State’s star posterizes with jukes, spin moves, stiff arms and heavy shoulders.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS JOHNSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Masters gets 10 more players from top 50 in the world ranking. Glover narrowly gets in
item.description: Lucas Glover held down the 50th spot in the final world ranking of the year, making him one of 10 players who will be added to the invitation list to play in the Masters. The field has eight more players than it did at this time a year ago.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington Mystics hire Jamila Wideman as general manager, Sydney Johnson as coach
item.description: The Washington Mystics hired Jamila Wideman as the franchise's new general manager and Sydney Johnson as the team's coach on Monday. Wideman joins the Mystics after spending six years at the NBA league office, where she most recently served as senior vice president of player development.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL great Michael Vick introduced as Norfolk State’s football coach
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — To shouts of “Coach” and “Let’s go Spartans,” Michael Vick was introduced Monday as Norfolk State’s football coach, a homecoming for the former NFL star and a splashy, attention-grabbing hire for a program that has struggled in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Eloy Jiménez, former White Sox slugger and top prospect, signs minor-league deal with Rays
item.description: Eloy Jiménez was once one of the top prospects in all of baseball coming up through the White Sox system, regarded as a foundational piece for a core of would-be White Sox future stars. On Monday, he signed a minor-league contract with the Tampa Bay Rays, according to MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: On Football: Falcons and Buccaneers flip spots atop the NFC South and playoff races tighten up
item.description: The 49ers, Cowboys and Cardinals are out of the playoff race. The Falcons took control of their hopes with help, and the Colts, Dolphins and Bengals kept slim chances alive. The NFL ’s playoff picture became clearer Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USC up to No. 4 in women's AP Top 25 after win over UConn. UCLA, South Carolina, Notre Dame stay 1-3
item.description: Southern California jumped to No. 4 in The Associated Press women's college basketball poll on Monday after edging UConn. The Trojans moved up three spots in the AP Top 25 after beating the then-No. 4 Huskies 72-70 on Saturday night in a rematch of last season's Elite Eight game that UConn won.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Heisman winner Travis Hunter, fiancée delete social media amid rumors, criticism
item.description: Colorado Buffaloes star and Heisman Trophy winner Travis Hunter has deleted his social media, as did his fiancée Leanna Lenee, amid online criticism
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys coach Mike McCarthy shares jubilant embrace with owner Jerry Jones amid contract drama
item.description: Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and owner Jerry Jones shared a warm embrace in the locker room after a win over the Buccaneers as the final season of McCarthy's contract nears an end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mickey, Minnie, Goofy and Wemby: Spurs-Knicks Christmas game is also an animated one at Disney World
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — There's a Christmas Day basketball game at Walt Disney World, featuring Mickey, Minnie, Goofy and Wemby. An animated game, anyway.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA star takes aim at Elon Musk, rips billionaires after funding bill gets passed
item.description: Phoenix Mercury star Natasha Cloud took aim at Elon Musk and ripped billionaires in a post on X after the short-term stopgap government funding bill was passed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers use short-handed goals to beat Lightning 4-2 in opener of home-and-home set
item.description: A.J. Greer and Eetu Luostarinen scored short-handed goals 42 seconds apart in the second period to help the Florida Panthers beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-2 on Sunday to open a home-and-home series.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade Cody Bellinger to New York Yankees
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have traded Cody Bellinger and cash to the New York Yankees in exchange for Cody Poteet, after Bellinger won a Silver Slugger award with the North Siders in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
